trades.reasoning: Top screener score (100) with volume surge, MACD bullish crossover, RSI 68.1 in ideal momentum zone, and price well above SMA-20 — best risk/reward on the board today.
RSI 60.9 leaves meaningful upside before overbought territory, full MACD bullish confirmation, and space sector has strong risk-on tailwinds with NASDAQ up 2.2%.
Lam Research is a core semiconductor equipment name with RSI 67.2 and complete MACD bullish stack — semiconductor equipment running hard on risk-on days.
RSI 60.0 has the most room to run among the 95-score names, MACD histogram rising, satellite broadband sector aligned with current tech momentum.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ +2.2% and S&P +1.6% — exactly the environment to deploy idle cash. We had 4 open slots and $1,172 sitting unused, so I filled all four with high-momentum names: VSAT (top score with volume surge), LUNR (space sector, RSI has room), LRCX (semiconductor equipment), and ASTS (satellite tech). No sells warranted — existing positions show no stop-loss triggers.

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged broadly on June 11 in a classic risk-on session, with technology and growth names leading the advance as investor appetite for higher-risk assets recovered. Semiconductor and AI-adjacent names were among the strongest performers, reflecting continued optimism around capital expenditure on data infrastructure. The broad-based advance suggests institutional rotation back into equities rather than a narrow sector move.
market_education.summary_zh: 6月11日市場出現全面風險偏好回升，科技與成長股領漲，投資者對高風險資產的需求明顯增加。半導體及AI相關個股表現尤為突出，反映市場對數據基礎設施資本支出的持續樂觀預期。此次上漲呈現廣泛性，顯示機構資金正重新流入股市，而非單一板塊輪動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy of buying stocks that have been rising strongly and selling those that have been falling, based on the idea that trends tend to continue. Today's risk-on session is a textbook environment for momentum: the screener surfaced names with RSI in the 55–70 zone, MACD bullish crossovers, and prices well above their 20-day averages — all momentum signals. The key risk is that momentum can reverse sharply when sentiment shifts, so stop-losses are essential.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期強勢上漲的股票、賣出持續下跌的股票，核心邏輯是價格趨勢往往具有延續性。今日風險偏好回升的環境正是動能策略的理想場景：篩選器找出RSI介於55至70之間、MACD出現黃金交叉、且股價高於20日均線的個股，均為典型動能信號。然而動能策略的主要風險在於，一旦市場情緒逆轉，股價可能急速回落，因此設置止損至關重要。
